{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|seo}}
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|infobox}}

{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|description}}
<% if (it.hasUsedByUpgrades) { %>
== Used by Upgrades ==
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|used_by_upgrades}}
<% } -%>
<% if (it.hasUsedByGears) { %>
== Used by Gears ==
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|used_by_gears}}
<% } -%>

{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|categories}}
